name: Charm Person
description: Target views caster as trusted friend; SV Negates; duration varies by INT

name: Detect Magic
description: Magic objects and areas glow

name: Floating Disc
description: Disc 3′ wide follows caster, holds up to 5,000cn

name: Hold Portal
description: Holds door, gate, or portal shut

name: Light
description: 15′ radius light; can blind one target (SV vs Spells) or dispel darkness
reversed: Darkness: 15′ radius magical darkness; blinds target on failed SV vs Spells

name: Magic Missile
description: 1d6+1 automatic damage; extra missile per 5 levels above 1st

name: Protection from Evil
description: +1 AC and saves vs evil creatures; blocks enchanted creature contact

name: Read Languages
description: Read any written language, code, or map

name: Read Magic
description: Decipher magical writing on scrolls and spell books

name: Shield
description: AC 2 [17] vs missiles, AC 4 [15] vs other attacks

name: Sleep
description: Single target up to 4+1 HD falls asleep, or 2d8 HD of targets ≤4HD; no save

name: Ventriloquism
description: Throw voice to any source within range

name: Continual Light
description: Permanent 30′ radius light; can blind one target or dispel magical darkness
reversed: Continual Darkness: permanent 30′ radius magical darkness

name: Detect Evil
description: Evil objects and creatures with evil intentions glow

name: Detect Invisible
description: Invisible creatures revealed to caster

name: ESP
description: Detect thoughts of creatures; concentrate 1 turn to focus direction

name: Invisibility
description: Target invisible until it attacks or casts a spell

name: Knock
description: Opens stuck, barred, or locked doors, gates, or portals

name: Levitate
description: Move vertically 20′ per round; horizontal movement by pushing off surfaces

name: Locate Object
description: Sense direction (not distance) to known object type

name: Mirror Image
description: 1d4 duplicates; attacks cancel one image

name: Phantasmal Force
description: Visual illusion in 20′ cube; ends if disbelieved or caster stops concentrating

name: Web
description: 10′ cube of sticky webs; escape 2d4 turns or burn 1d6 damage

name: Wizard Lock
description: Permanently locks any portal; caster can bypass freely

name: Clairvoyance
description: See through eyes of a creature within range; concentrate 1 turn to focus

name: Dispel Magic
description: End all non-instant spells in 20′ cube

name: Fire Ball
description: 20′ radius explosion, 1d6/level damage; SV ½

name: Fly
description: Flight at movement rate 360′ (120′)

name: Haste
description: Up to 24 creatures in 30′ radius: double speed and attacks

name: Hold Person
description: Paralyse 1 target (SV –2) or 1d4 targets; SV Negates

name: Infravision
description: Subject gains 60′ infravision

name: Invisibility 10′ Radius
description: All within 10′ of target invisible until they attack or cast

name: Lightning Bolt
description: 60′×5′ bolt, 1d6/level damage; SV ½

name: Protection from Evil 10′ Radius
description: +1 AC and saves vs evil; blocks enchanted creature contact for all in area

name: Protection from Normal Missiles
description: Complete immunity to normal (non-magical, non-giant) missile weapons

name: Water Breathing
description: Single subject can breathe underwater

name: Charm Monster
description: 1 creature >3HD or 3d6 creatures ≤3HD view caster as friend; SV Negates

name: Confusion
description: 3d6 creatures in 60′ act randomly for duration; SV Negates

name: Dimension Door
description: Teleport self or one creature to any location within 360′

name: Growth of Plants
description: Vegetation in up to 3,000 sq ft grows into dense thicket

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
description: Disguise terrain as different type; dispelled by touch

name: Massmorph
description: Up to 100 human-sized creatures within area appear as trees

name: Polymorph Others
description: Transform target into any creature up to 2× HD; SV Negates

name: Polymorph Self
description: Transform self into any creature up to caster’s HD

name: Remove Curse
description: Remove one curse from creature or object
reversed: Bestow Curse: –4 to attack rolls, saves, or one ability; SV Negates

name: Wall of Fire
description: Up to 1,200 sq ft wall of fire; 1d6+level damage to pass through

name: Wall of Ice
description: Up to 1,200 sq ft ice wall; fire-using creatures take +1/die damage to break

name: Wizard Eye
description: Invisible eye moves 120′/turn with normal and infravision

name: Animate Dead
description: Animate skeletons/zombies; max HD equal to caster’s level

name: Cloudkill
description: Moving cloud of poison; 1 damage/round + SV or die for creatures <5HD

name: Conjure Elemental
description: Summon 16HD elemental; caster must concentrate or it turns hostile

name: Contact Higher Plane
description: Commune with a higher power; 3–12 yes/no questions; risk of insanity

name: Feeblemind
description: Target arcane spellcaster loses all mental capacity permanently; SV –4

name: Hold Monster
description: Paralyse 1 target (SV –2) or 1d4 monsters; SV Negates

name: Magic Jar
description: Transfer soul to prepared container; possess bodies within 120′

name: Pass-Wall
description: Creates 5′ diameter, 10′ deep hole through any wall

name: Telekinesis
description: Move 200cn/level at 20′/round by concentration; max 6 rounds

name: Teleport
description: Instant transport to any known location; accuracy depends on familiarity

name: Transmute Rock to Mud
description: Up to 3,000 sq ft of rock becomes mud for 3d6 days
reversed: Mud to Rock: solidify mud back to rock; permanent

name: Wall of Stone
description: Permanent stone wall up to 1,000 cu ft

name: Anti-Magic Shell
description: Invisible barrier blocks all magic passing in either direction

name: Control Weather
description: Control one type of weather in 240-yard radius while concentrating

name: Death Spell
description: Kills up to 4d8 HD of creatures in 60′ cube; SV Negates

name: Disintegrate
description: Destroy one creature or object; SV Negates

name: Geas
description: Target must complete a task; penalties if ignored; SV Negates

name: Invisible Stalker
description: Summon invisible stalker to complete one mission; interprets literally

name: Lower Water
description: Reduce water depth by half over up to 10,000 sq ft

name: Move Earth
description: Move dirt, sand, or soil (not stone) at 60′/turn while concentrating

name: Part Water
description: Create 10′ wide, 120′ long path through water

name: Projected Image
description: Illusory duplicate of caster; spells appear to come from it; dispelled by touch

name: Reincarnation
description: Restore dead character in a new body determined by random table

name: Stone to Flesh
description: Restore petrified creature or transform stone into flesh
reversed: Flesh to Stone: turn a living creature to stone; SV Negates
